info.title: Conduit API
info.description: REST API for the Conduit data pipeline orchestrator. Conduit is a Rust-native orchestration engine for DAGs (directed acyclic graphs) that compiles and schedules data pipelines with support for complex dependencies, dynamic scheduling, and schema contracts.

get.description: Basic health check endpoint. No authentication required.
Get system information including version, paths, and resource counts.
Retrieve all compiled DAGs with basic metadata.
Retrieve full details for a specific DAG including all tasks and dependencies.
Retrieve the execution graph (task dependencies) for a DAG.

post.description: Compile DAG definitions from files and check for errors.

get.description: Get all runs (executions) for a specific DAG.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of runs to return

post.description: Queue a new execution of a DAG. Returns immediately with run ID.

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific run including task states.
Get all runs across all DAGs.
Get all virtual environments (dev, staging, production, etc.).

post.description: Promote configs from source to target environment.
Generate a Terraform-style plan showing what would change in an environment.
Apply a previously generated plan to update the target environment.

get.description: Query event history with range and type filtering for time-travel debugging.

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Filter by event type (e.g., TaskCompleted, TaskFailed)

post.description: Parse SQL and extract column-level lineage. Optionally include OpenLineage metadata to emit a RunEvent with a columnLineage output dataset facet.

sql.example: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) as total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id

source_task_id.description: Task ID where this SQL runs

output_dataset.description: Output dataset name, for example analytics.customer_totals

dataset_namespace.description: Namespace for input and output datasets

job_name.description: OpenLineage job name. Defaults to source_task_id

openlineage.description: OpenLineage RunEvent, present only when OpenLineage options are supplied.

post.description: Find all upstream sources for a column.
Find all downstream consumers of a column.
Build complete lineage graph for visualization.
Compare two schemas and detect breaking changes.
Validate a schema against a contract specification.

get.description: Get all schema contracts across all DAGs.
Get all metrics from contract definitions.
Get all configured external connections (databases, data warehouses, etc.).

post.description: Create a backfill job for a DAG over a date range.

get.description: Get overall cluster health and worker status.

post.description: Gracefully drain a worker (stop accepting new tasks).
Create a new API key. Returns plaintext key (only shown once).

get.description: List all API keys (without plaintext values).

BearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Use format: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

schedule.description: Cron schedule or NULL if ad-hoc

prefix.description: First few characters of the key (for identification)
